2606.30639.title: Self-Evolving World Models for LLM Agent Planning
2606.30639.paper_summary: World models offer a principled way to equip long-horizon LLM agents with foresight: predictions of action consequences before execution. However, unreliable foresight can be ignored, misused, or even degrade downstream decision-making. In this paper, we introduce WorldEvolver, a self-evolving world model framework that revises its deployment-time context while keeping the downstream agent and all model parameters frozen. WorldEvolver integrates three modules: (i) Episodic Memory, which exploits real action transitions through retrieval-based simulation; (ii) Semantic Memory, which extracts persistent heuristic rules from prediction-observation mismatches; and (iii) Selective Foresight, which filters low-confidence predictions before integrating them into agent reasoning context. We evaluate WorldEvolver on ALFWorld and ScienceWorld, measuring world model prediction accuracy on Word2World and downstream agent success rate on AgentBoard. Extensive experiments show that WorldEvolver achieves the highest prediction accuracy across three backbones and leads other world model baselines on downstream agent success rate, demonstrating that test-time memory revision enhances both predictive fidelity and planning performance.
2606.30639.paper_summary_zh: 世界模型提供了一種原則性的方法，以使長期視野的 LLM 代理具備前瞻性：在執行之前對行動後果的預測。然後，不可靠的前瞻性可能會被忽視、誤用，甚至降低下游決策的質量。在本文中，我們介紹了 WorldEvolver，一個自我演變的世界模型框架，該框架在保持下游代理和所有模型參數不變的情況下，修訂其部署時的上下文。WorldEvolver 整合了三個模組：（i）情節記憶，透過基於檢索的模擬利用真實行動轉換；（ii）語義記憶，從預測與觀察不匹配中提取持久的啟發式規則；以及（iii）選擇性前瞻性，在將低信心預測整合到代理推理上下文之前進行過濾。我們在 ALFWorld 和 ScienceWorld 上評估 WorldEvolver，測量 Word2World 的世界模型預測準確性和 AgentBoard 上下游代理的成功率。廣泛的實驗顯示，WorldEvolver 在三個基礎模型中實現了最高的預測準確性，並在下游代理成功率上領先其他世界模型基準，證明了測試時記憶修訂提升了預測的真實性和規劃性能。
2606.30639.author: Xuan Zhang et.al.
2606.30639.authors: Xuan Zhang, Wenxuan Zhang, See-Kiong Ng, Yang Deng
